KICKOFF (/rebar-implement). Epic 6d0d in_progress. State:
CLOSED+green in Gerrit (code NOT on main yet): 368c(#649), 42d1(#650), e4df(#660) — LLM-Review+MAX Verified+MAX, 0 unresolved. Stack: main(e23387fd1)->#649->#650->#660->#664. 5893 closed (superseded).
REMAINING open: 4214(#664, LLM-Review -REJ era-anchor, Verified+MAX), 8d8e-30bc-6a7f-4cb1 (producer seam), ee0b (trusted gate FastAPI service), 76d2 (AWS IaC + REAL prod deploy), 8f1d (HMAC removal), 6a89 (docs/ADR).
Order: land 649/650/660 -> 4214 -> 8d8e -> ee0b -> 76d2(deploy) -> 8f1d -> 6a89. NOTE: 76d2 = real AWS prod deploy, will pause for user.
ACTION1: early-land foundation. Regression-safety: additive (rebar.opcert.v1 kind + DSSE storage + trusted_environments.yaml support); local certs default to process-records, no gate requires them; Verified+MAX; 0 unresolved. Submit #660 -> submits #650,#649 atomically.
